name: Technical Report on the CVPR 2026@AdvML Workshop Challenge

description: arXiv:2607.11560v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Vision-language agents (VLAs) are increasingly used to interpret complex driving scenes and support safety-critical reasoning. This report presents the CVPR 2026@AdvML Workshop Challenge on adversarial multimodal attacks against autonomous-driving VLAs. Built on DriveLM-style multi-view visual question answering, the challenge represents each sc...
